product.name: Plasson Red Adaptor for IRS Normal Gauge
product.description: This red polypropylene IRS adaptor by Plasson will convert metric fittings on a blue MDPE (Medium Density Polyethylene) pipe to a black Imperial pipe with a normal gauge. This makes it well suited for conveying water and other fluids in urban and inter-urban infrastructure, industrial, mining, landscape and farming applications. Designed for use on a IS 134:1977 Polyethylene pipe type 32, the Plasson 7995 features an approved 16 bar rated fittings system. It comes in several nominal and fitting sizes, making it a versatile and convenient option. What's more, it's approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme).Features & Benefits: Plasson Red Adaptor for IRS Normal GaugeConvenient polypropylene Irish adaptor to convert metric fittings to Imperial pipe16 bar ratified fitting systemAvailable in multiple sizes in redWRAS approved
product.variant_name: Plasson Red Adaptor for IRS Normal Gauge - 1/2 inch

product.name: Plasson Pipe Liner
product.description: This pipe liner can be used for a variety of pipes to maintain strength and integrity. Ideal for conveying water and other fluids in urban and inter-urban infrastructures, industrial, mining, landscape and farming applications. Made for joining polyethylene (PE) pipes, this push-fit pipe liner has a working pressure of up to 16 bar.Suitable for potable water applications and withstanding sub-zero temperatures, this pipe liner is available in a range of metric sizes from 20mm up to 63mm. This WRAS approved fitting has a captive o-ring seal which provides long-lasting protection against leakage and does not require tightening to achieve a full seal.Features & Benefits: Plasson Pipe LinerSuitable in rural and municipal areas, mining, industry, agriculture and communication lines  Polyacetal split rings and NBR o-rings supplied as standard  Suitable for use on potable water, withstanding sub-zero temperatures  Working pressure of up to 16 bar  Available in a range of metric sizes  WRAS approved  Cost-effective and affordable  Low maintenance once installed without the need for tightening
product.variant_name: Plasson Push-Fit Pipe Liner - 20mm

product.name: Plasson Meter Mount Kit
product.description: The Plasson Meter Mount Kit is engineered for the purpose of below-ground water meter connections. This kit will accommodate standard 15mm concentric meters and features a push-fit connection compatible with 22mm copper/PB/PEX pipework. Its monobloc design ensures a prompt and trouble-free installation process, complemented by a 1.5-inch Class D concentric meter connection.Features include a quarter-turn high-flow mains stop valve, integrated double check valve, and drain point. KUKreg4 approval attests to its adherence to Kiwa UK Regulation 4, and its NBR and EPDM sealing guarantee impeccable water-tight integrity.Features & Benefits: Plasson Meter Mount KitEngineered for below-ground water meter connectionsAccommodates standard 15mm concentric metersPush-fit connection compatible with 22mm copper/PB/PEX pipeworkMonobloc design for swift, trouble-free installation1.5-inch Class D concentric meter connectionNBR and EPDM sealing for water-tight integrityHas a quarter-turn high-flow mains stop valveAlso has an integrated double check valve, and drain pointKUKreg4 approvedStandards & CertificationKIWA U.K. Regulation 4 (KUKreg4)

product.name: Plasson Mains Female x Female Stop Valve
product.description: This female x female mains stop valve is suitable for above and below ground and can be used in contaminated land. WRAS approved, this high performance non-metallic mains stop valve is an ideal alternative to the universal DZR and gunmetal stop valves.  With a quarter turn operation, this stop valve is lead free and corrosion resistant for long service life. product.name: PLASSONE 0341C Pushfit Plastic Stoptap MDPE to Copper
product.description: The PLASSONE 0341C Pushfit Plastic Stoptap is a versatile and innovative solution for connecting MDPE pipes to copper, PEX, and PB systems. With its pushfit design, it offers a quick, secure, and tool-free installation, ensuring efficiency and reliability in every project. Individually packed with an MDPE liner, this stoptap ensures optimal performance and compatibility while maintaining a professional finish.WRAS-approved to PN16, this stoptap guarantees adherence to the highest industry standards, making it ideal for potable water systems. Whether for repairs, upgrades, or new installations, the PLASSONE 0341C provides a dependable and convenient option for managing water flow effectively.Features & Benefits: PLASSONE 0341C Pushfit Plastic Stoptap MDPE to CopperEasily links MDPE pipes to copper, PEX, and PB systems for seamless integrationWRAS Approved to PN16 for reliable use in potable water systemsPushfit design allows for tool-free setupStandards & CertificationWRAS approved

product.name: Plasson Concentric Meter Mount Kit With Drain Off
product.description: This high quality internal meter mount kit with drain off by Plasson is part of a comprehensive solution that provides safe and reliable water connections. Suitable for copper, PEX (cross-linked polyethylene) and polybutylene PB) piping, this robust PP (polypropylene) meter mount kit conveniently comes with a built-in drain valve to allow excess water vapor to escape into the atmosphere. Thanks to the O-Rings, it's sturdy, highly durable and very easy to service.   Developed according to UK market demand, the 3517 Concentric Meter Mount Kit is manufactured to the highest standards to meet all Water Utility company requirements. What's more, it accepts all standard 15mm concentric meters and is available in sizes of 25 x 15mm, 25 x 22mm and 22 x 22mm, making it a versatile solution ideal for various new build and renovation projects.Features & Benefits: Plasson Concentric Meter Mount Kit With Drain OffTough all polypropylene concentric meter mount kit  Versatile Cu/PB/PEX outlet pipe connection  Accepts all standard 15mm concentric meters  Metric PE inlet pipe connection  O-Ring sealed joints  Built-in drain valve
product.variant_name: DISCON - Plasson Concentric Meter Mount Kit With Drain Off - 25mm x 15mm

product.name: Potterton Gold Heat Only Electric Boiler
product.description: The Potterton Gold Heat Only Electric Boiler offers a compact and efficient solution for wet central heating systems, ideal for properties where space is limited or gas connections are unavailable. This model provides ample heat for medium-sized homes. Its slimline design allows for discreet installation in cupboards or utility rooms, making it a versatile choice for various domestic settings.Operating on a 230V single-phase supply, the Gold Electric Boiler is suitable for both pressurised and open-vented systems. It features a stainless-steel heat exchanger, ensuring durability and efficient heat transfer. The boiler is compatible with standard radiators and can be controlled using standard programmers, room thermostats, and thermostatic radiator valves. Not suitable for use with underfloor heating.Features & Benefits: Potterton Gold Heat Only Electric BoilerSilent operation & no flue or fuel tank requirementsA cleaner & more straightforward installation processSlimline profile allows for installation in tight spacesPlease note: It is a legal requirement to have your boiler installed by a certified Gas Safe installer. Please do not attempt to install if you don't have the correct certification.Please check the correct boiler type has been ordered before opening the box. Returns can only be accepted if the packaging is unopened and undamaged.If once the boiler has been installed you notice something wrong, please contact your Gas Safe installer first and they'll work with the manufacturer to resolve it under the warranty.There is a 15% restocking fee that applies to most returns.

product.name: Reliance Water Controls Female x Female Brass Double Check Valve
product.description: The double check valve from Reliance Water Controls is used for the prevention of back flow and back-siphonage contamination risks. It's made of DZR (dezincification resistant) brass, with EPDM (ethylene propylene diene monomer, a highly durable rubber compound) seals, acetyl copolymer check cartridges and a stainless steel spring. Thanks to the compact, lightweight construction, it's quick and easy to install.What's more, the valve allows a high flow rate with minimum pressure drop, making it ideal for all Class 3 contamination risks as per water supply (water fittings) Regulations 1999. It has a 0.1 bar minimum pressure and 16 bar maximum pressure, with a maximum temperature of 80 degrees Celsius.Features & Benefits: Reliance Water Controls Female x Female Brass Double Check ValveDurable RWC brass double check valveIntegral test point for monitoring correct functioning of the downstream check valveSuitable for all Class 3 contamination risks0.1 bar-16 bar working pressure80 degrees Celsius maximum temperatureQuick and easy to install

product.name: RWC Aquasystem White Potable Heating Expansion Vessel
product.description: This Aquasysytem expansion vessel is a sturdy and easy-to-maintain system that's perfect for both potable water and heating applications. The vessel itself is constructed with an internal membrane that prevents water from coming into contact with the steel housing, easily replaced without dismounting the vessel.With a range of sizes available from 2l to 25l, these vessels come with a pre-charge valve for topping up air pressure and are WRAS approved.Features & Benefits: RWC Aquasystem White Potable Heating Expansion Vessel3.0 BarIdeal for both heating and potable water systemsInternal membrane keeps water separate from steel componentsQuiet and reliable operation throughout service lifeRange of sizes available from 2l to 25lWRAS approvedComes with pre-charge valve

product.name: RWC 104 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve
product.description: Safeguard your unvented heating system with the RWC 104 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve. Specially designed for high-capacity cold water systems, this advanced pressure relief valve offers unmatched protection against over-pressurisation, ensuring smooth and safe operation. With a set relief pressure range of 2.5-8.0 bar, the valve automatically lifts and discharges excess pressure, providing reliable safety for your system.Crafted with an outlet connection larger than the inlet, it handles high-capacity discharge effortlessly. The diaphragm design enhances resistance to scale, making it ideal for cold water systems. Whether for domestic or commercial use, this valve is a dependable solution to keeping your system operating safely and efficiently. Features & Benefits: RWC 104 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief ValveHigh-capacity protectionDiaphragm design resists scaling; quick single-piece cartridge removal simplifies cleaning or replacementAvailable in multiple pressure settings and connection sizes for versatile use
product.variant_name: RWC 104 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve F x F 3.5 Bar - 1/2 inch x 3/4 inch

Specially designed for high-capacity cold water systems, this advanced pressure relief valve offers unmatched protection against over-pressurisation, ensuring smooth and safe operation. With a set relief pressure range of 2.5-8.0 bar, the valve automatically lifts and discharges excess pressure, providing reliable safety for your system.Crafted with an outlet connection larger than the inlet, it handles high-capacity discharge effortlessly. The diaphragm design enhances resistance to scale, making it ideal for cold water systems. Whether for domestic or commercial use, this valve is a dependable solution to keeping your system operating safely and efficiently. Features & Benefits: RWC 104 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief ValveHigh-capacity protectionDiaphragm design resists scaling; quick single-piece cartridge removal simplifies cleaning or replacementAvailable in multiple pressure settings and connection sizes for versatile use
product.variant_name: RWC 104 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve F x F 6 Bar - 3/4 inch x 1 inch

product.name: Ausimix Compact Thermostatic Mixing Valves
product.description: The Ausimix Compact Thermostatic Mixing Valve is a reliable and high-performance solution designed to ensure safe and stable water temperatures in your plumbing systems. With a rapid fail-safe mechanism that activates if the hot or cold supply fails, this valve provides added peace of mind, making it ideal for both residential and commercial applications. Its innovative design ensures stable mixed water temperatures and delivers up to 35 litres per minute at 2.5 bar pressure for optimal performance.Featuring flat-faced union connections, the Ausimix valve is easy to install and maintain, saving time and effort during servicing. It also includes a unique temperature adjustment tool incorporated into the cap, allowing precise control with minimal fuss. Fully compliant with Part G and D08 standards, this thermostatic mixing valve ensures efficiency, safety, and long-term reliability.Features & Benefits: Ausimix Compact Thermostatic Mixing ValvesRapid fail-safeStable temperature controlEasy maintenance
product.variant_name: Ausimix Compact 2 in 1 Thermostatic Mixing Valve 35 L/min at 2.5bar 15mm

product.name: Reliance Water Controls Predator Pressure Reducing Valve With Gauge
product.description: This predator pressure reducing valve is a drop tight valve that effortlessly controls the pressure under both flow and no-flow conditions. The integral strainer protects the seat of the valve and ensures it is completely serviceable. It can be installed in any orientation for the ultimate installation flexibility and is complete with both pressure gauge and gauge port plug. Features & Benefits: Reliance Water Controls Predator Pressure Reducing Valve With GaugeSuitable for hot and cold applicationsSeamlessly controls the pressure under both flow and no-flow conditionsIntegral strainer protects the seat of the valve and ensures it is completely serviceableInstalled in any orientation for installation flexibilityComplete with both pressure gauge and gauge port plug
product.variant_name: Reliance Water Controls Predator Pressure Reducing Valve With Gauge - 15mm

product.name: Reliance Water Controls 320 Series Easiset 45 Degree Pressure Reducing Valve
product.description: The 320 Series of pressure reducing valves by RWC are ideal for protecting water supply installations against excess supply pressures and fluctuating mains supplies that might otherwise damage your plumbing system. They feature an easy-to-read unique indicator that can identify set pressure without a pressure gauge. These robust valves are suitable for use in both hot and cold supplies with pressure up to 25 bar and maximum temperature of 70°C. What's more, they're adjustable between 1-6 bar and can be installed in any orientation, making them a convenient solution. Thanks to the drop tight valve, pressure under flow and no flow conditions is controlled securely.These sturdy valves are made from DZR (dezincification resistant) brass for high durability, designed to a strict BSEN 1567 Water Pressure Reducing Valves and Combination Water Reducing Valves standard and approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme), so you can be sure they're of the highest quality.Features & Benefits: Reliance Water Controls 320 Series Easiset 45 Degree Pressure Reducing Valve Robust DRZ pressure reducing valvesEasy-to-read pressure indicatorCan be installed in any orientationSingle-piece, easy to replace cartridgeFully serviceable integral strainerSuitable for cold suppliesDesigned to BSEN 1567 & WRAS approved

product.name: RWC Aquasystem Blue Potable Heating Expansion Vessel
product.description: This Aquasystem blue potable heating expansion vessel utilises a stainless steel bolted flange in order to avoid corrosion. The extra wide membrane opening reduces noise that can be caused by restricted flow and the internal membrane stops water from meeting with the steel shell, acting as another deterrent to corrosion. With a range of sizes,  this Aquasystem is provided with a replaceable membrane so that the vessel can be serviced for maintenance without being removed. Features & Benefits: RWC Aquasystem Blue Potable Heating Expansion VesselResistant to corrosionReduces noiseIncludes re-charge valve for topping up air pressureCompatible with both potable water and heating applicationsWRAS Approved

product.name: Reliance Water Controls 315i Series Commercial Pressure Reducing Valve
product.description: The 315i Series of pressure reducing valves by RWC are ideal for protecting water supply installations against excess supply pressures and fluctuating mains supplies that might otherwise damage your plumbing system. They feature an easy-to-read unique indicator that can identify set pressure without a pressure gauge. These robust valves are suitable for use in both hot and cold supplies with pressure up to 25 bar and maximum temperature of 70°C. What's more, they're adjustable between 1-6 bar and can be installed in any orientation, making them a convenient solution. Thanks to the drop tight valve, pressure under flow and no flow conditions is controlled securely. These sturdy valves are made from DZR (dezincification resistant) brass for high durability, designed to a strict BSEN 1567 Water Pressure Reducing Valves and Combination Water Reducing Valves standard and approved by the WRAS (Water Regulations Approval Scheme), so you can be sure they're of the highest quality.Features & Benefits: Reliance Water Controls 315i Series Commercial Pressure Reducing ValveRobust DRZ pressure reducing valves  Easy-to-read pressure indicator  Can be installed in any orientation  Single-piece, easy to replace cartridge  Fully serviceable integral strainer  Suitable for cold supplies  Designed to BSEN 1567 & WRAS approved
product.variant_name: Reliance Water Controls 315i Series Commercial Pressure Reducing Valve Union - 15mm

product.name: RWC Thermal Balancing Valve With Insulation
product.description: This thermal balancing valve is perfect for circulating your hot water system. It works by regulating the flow of water in order to maintain a continual temperature. product.name: RWC Heating Vessels With Brackets
product.description: This Heating Expansion Vessel with a replaceable membrane 3/4" and brackets is ideal for a heating system to allow the expansion that occurs when heating water. The volume of water increases by approximately 4.5% when being heated from 0°C to 100°C. When water temperature increases, the vessel's internal membrane expands so that water can fill the vessel. The membrane will expand until the system reaches its maximum temperature.Features & Benefits: RWC Heating Vessels With BracketsReplaceable membraneIncludes bracketsAccommodates expansion from heated waterUseful for heating systems

product.name: RWC Easyfit Thermostatic Mixing Valve 2 in 1
product.description: The Easifit Thermostatic Mixing Valve (TMV) blends hot and cold water to ensure safe and comfortable water temperature, in turn reducing the risk of accidental injuries and burns. Compact and lightweight, Easifit is great tight spaces. Easifit complies with all relevant UK and European performance standards. The range is WRAS approved and holds TMV2 and TMV3 certificates.With the latest RWC advanced valve design and production techniques, the TMV can function at flow rates as low as 1 lpm and is also resistant to the adherence of scale and other system contaminants. This ensures valve longevity.Features & Benefits: RWC Easyfit Thermostatic Mixing Valve 2 in 1Blends hot and cold water to ensure safe and comfortable water temperatureLowers risk of accidental injuries and burnsCompact and lightweightGood in tight spacesMeets relevant UK and European performance standardsWRAS approvedTMV2 and TMV3 certificates

product.name: RWC 100 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve
product.description: Reliance Water Controls '100 series' line of sealed heating system pressure relief valves are a heavy-duty solution for pressure management. In a range of sizes, the 100 series has a generous 0.5-2.5 bar pressure range across the line, able to deal with the demands of a wide number of applications.With an increased outlet size that exceeds the inlet, these relief valves will provide protection against overpressurisation in wet heating systems, serving to improve their resistance against scale and damage. These valves work using an easy-to-use cartridge system to cut down on servicing time and remove the need to reset response pressure.Features & Benefits: RWC 100 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve Wide variety of imperial dimensions availableGenerous working pressure ranges across the lineEasy-to-us cartridge system cuts down on servicing downtimeProtects against over-pressurisation in wet heating systems
product.variant_name: RWC 100 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve F x F 3 Bar- 1 inch x 1 1/4 inch

In a range of sizes, the 100 series has a generous 0.5-2.5 bar pressure range across the line, able to deal with the demands of a wide number of applications.With an increased outlet size that exceeds the inlet, these relief valves will provide protection against overpressurisation in wet heating systems, serving to improve their resistance against scale and damage. These valves work using an easy-to-use cartridge system to cut down on servicing time and remove the need to reset response pressure.Features & Benefits: RWC 100 Series High Capacity Sealed Heating Pressure Relief Valve Wide variety of imperial dimensions availableGenerous working pressure ranges across the lineEasy-to-us cartridge system cuts down on servicing downtimeProtects against over-pressurisation in wet heating systems

product.name: Dow Corning Geocel 785 Bacteria Resistant Sanitary Silicone Sealant
product.description: This Geocel 785 bacteria resistant sanitary silicone sealant is a one part, bacteria-resistant silicone sealant that provides fantastic adhesion to a majority of non-porous surfaces. product.name: Hep2o Straight Connector
product.description: These Hep2O straight connectors are part of a versatile and robust plastic piping system that boasts a massive range of benefits over traditional metal pipework, cutting down on installation and maintenance and saving you money the moment you buy. Corrosion and scale-free, the Hep2O family of pipes and fittings is the perfect starting point for your next plumbing challenge.The modular nature of these fittings means they install easily and securely using the screw collars. They can be locked in place for a lasting seal but remain fully demountable, making refits painless and straightforward. In addition, with watertight sealing built into the system, you can rely on leak-free performance through the operational life, standing up to wear and tear with a 50-year manufacturer's guarantee.Features & Benefits: Hep2o Straight ConnectorTotally corrosion and scale-freeEasy to install, demount and secureLeak-free watertight seals throughout its operating life and covered by a 50-year manufacturer's guarantee
product.variant_name: Hep2o Straight Connector - 22mm

product.name: Hep2O Push Fit Polybutylene Barrier Pipe

product.name: Gastite Straight Fitting Assembly Brass Female BSPT
product.description: This Gastite Straight Fitting connects flexible gas piping to your gas supply, distribution manifolds or gas appliances while providing a metal-to-metal seal without split rings, O-rings or gaskets. The self-guiding assembly ensures a perfectly even flare while featuring the exclusive, patented Jacket-Lock, fitting eliminates exposed stainless steel beyond the nut. All components are fully reusable.Gastite has launched a mobile application for sizing calculations on iPhone and Android devices. The free app offers you the opportunity to solve sizing instantly from your mobile device. This is an impressive leap from the existing method, referring to printed tables and making calculations manually.Features & Benefits: Gastite Straight Fitting Assembly Brass Female BSPTBrass constructionFemale British Standard Pipe Taper (BSPT)ReusableMulti-point seal for greater durability and confidenceSelf-guiding assembly to ensure a perfectly even flarePatented XR2 Jacket Lock fitting meaning no wrapping or taping of any jointsMetal-to-metal sealNo split rings, O-rings or gasketsConnects the flexible gas piping to the gas supply, distribution manifolds or gas appliancesAvailable in a range of sizes
product.variant_name: Gastite Straight Fitting Assembly Brass Female BSPT - DN20 x 3/4 inch

product.name: Gastite EU Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing
product.description: This Gastite Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) is a flexible and reliable system for supplying natural gas or LPG to appliances. product.name: Gastite XR2 Series Brass Coupling
product.description: This Gastite XR2 Series Brass Coupling allows for the splicing and additions to connect flexible gas piping and includes a fitting adaptor, bushings and nut. Featuring the patented XR2 Jacket Lock fitting, it does not require wrapping or taping of any joints and provides self-guiding assembly to ensure a perfectly even flare. With a multi-point seal for greater durability and confidence, this coupling has a tool-less flare design so that no special tools are needed. Delivering a metal-to-metal seal without split rings, O-rings and gaskets, it is fully reusable.Features & Benefits: Gastite XR2 Series Brass CouplingAllows for the splicing and additions to connect the flexible gas pipingReusableMulti-point sealSelf-guiding assemblyPatented XR2 Jacket Lock fittingMetal-to-metal sealTool-less flare designFitting adaptor, bushings and nutBrass constructionAvailable in a range of diameters
product.variant_name: WOFF - Gastite XR2 Series Brass Coupling - DN15

product.name: Gastite XR2 Series Brass Coupling
product.description: This Gastite XR2 Series Brass Coupling allows for the splicing and additions to connect flexible gas piping and includes a fitting adaptor, bushings and nut. Featuring the patented XR2 Jacket Lock fitting, it does not require wrapping or taping of any joints and provides self-guiding assembly to ensure a perfectly even flare. product.name: Wiseman Everflux
product.description: This Wisemans Everflux is soluble in hot and cold water and is ideal for use with leaded and unleaded solder with its high melting threshold. With a non-stick formulation, this Everflux allows easy joint adjustment after fluxing. This fast-acting Everflux cleans as it solders and has a low odour formulation that helps provide an improved working environment. Features & Benefits: Wiseman EverfluxAvailable in a range of sizesManufactured in the UK to ISO 9001Exported throughout the worldLow odourFast-actingNon-stickSoluble in hot and cold waterIdeal for use with leaded and unleaded solderCleans as it solders Standards & CertificationStandards met: BS6891, MARC Solubility, DIN 851, ASTM B813/93, Water, Central Heating and Gas ServicesWRAS Listed: BS6920 by Water Regulatory Advisory Scheme as a material which has passed full tests of effect on water quality Directory Reference number 0410520
product.variant_name: DISCON - Wiseman Everflux Stick - 25g

product.name: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Pressure Sealed System Kit
product.description: This Robokit Intafill pressure vessel and Sealed System Kit from Zimlet is an excellent all-in-one system for retrofitting or part of a new build. Versatile and reliable, these pressure vessels combine a range of practical features as well as modern safety compliance, making them a solid and popular choice amongst installers.Supplied in a range of sizes from 4l all the way to 50l, there's a vessel no matter the size of your project, with flexible options for installation thanks to the supplied wall brackets. Combine this with a range of possible installation orientations, and this vessel is a solid choice no matter how demanding your space requirements are. Within the kit is a filling loop, double check valve, isolating ball assembly, ball and safety relief valve, everything you need to install a sealed system. These Robotkit vessels are also compliant with the Construction Project Regulations as well as G24.1 and G24.2 of the water regulations.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Pressure Sealed System KitComes in a wide range of sizesWall-mounting brackets supplied with lighter vesselsSolid construction and compliance with a range of UK regulationsFlexible installation with multiple ways to mount the systemRange of useful sealed system parts included in the kit
product.variant_name: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Vessel Sealed System Kit - 8l

Combine this with a range of possible installation orientations, and this vessel is a solid choice no matter how demanding your space requirements are. Within the kit is a filling loop, double check valve, isolating ball assembly, ball and safety relief valve, everything you need to install a sealed system. These Robotkit vessels are also compliant with the Construction Project Regulations as well as G24.1 and G24.2 of the water regulations.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Robokit Intafil Pressure Sealed System KitComes in a wide range of sizesWall-mounting brackets supplied with lighter vesselsSolid construction and compliance with a range of UK regulationsFlexible installation with multiple ways to mount the systemRange of useful sealed system parts included in the kit

product.name: Zilmet Automatic Air Vents
product.description: This Zilmet  automatic air vent is an excellent source of passive protection again excess air in domestic and light commercial heating systems. The vent continually removes air from the system once it reaches a certain level, cutting out the need to vent it during maintenance manually. These vents are easy to install and maintain, coming in a range of capacities.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Automatic Air VentsComes in a range of capacitiesSuitable for domestic and light commercial heating applicationsPrevents excess air from reaching a certain levelCuts down on manual maintenance

product.name: Zilmet CAL-PRO Floor Standing Heating Expansion Vessel
product.description: CAL-PRO expansion vessels by Zilmet absorb the water volume variations in closed heating systems. They maintain constant pressure, which helps reduce energy consumption and saves you money. They're available in a broad range of capacity from 4 litres to 900 litres, making them an ideal solution for various domestic and commercial unvented central heating systems. CAL-PRO vessels work by accommodating the increased water volume during system heating in an unvented circuit. Thanks to the pressurised membrane, water can enter or leave only during periods of heating and cooling.The sturdy vessels consist of crimped or welded carbon steel shells and synthetic SBR (styrene-butadiene) rubber according to DIN 4807-3 norms ('Expansion Vessels, Elastomer Membranes; Requirements and Testing'), which maximise tank drawdown for all capacities. They're painted on the outside with red epoxy polyester powder coating which provides an elegant, long-lasting finish. CAL-PRO vessels can operate between -10°C and 90°C and have a maximum working pressure between 1.5 bar and 6 bar depending on their capacity.Features & Benefits: Zilmet CAL-PRO Floor Standing Heating Expansion VesselLong-lasting energy: efficient heating expansion vessels  Available in multiple capacities of  4l to 900 l  Made of carbon steel and SBR rubber  Available in red  Maximum operating temperature -10°C to 90°C Please note: Please note CAL-PRO vessels between 4 litres and 24 litres are sold complete with bracket.
product.variant_name: Zilmet CAL-PRO Floor Standing Heating Expansion Vessel - 250l

product.name: Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane
product.description: This Zimlet horizontal vessel is fantastic for irrigation pumps, centrifugal pumps, submersible pumps, and booster sets. The capacity of a bladder tank is greater than that of other storage tanks, although the same performance can be achieved with a smaller volume, which allows minimum pump starts and retains energy. With a  range of different sizes, you can find the right vessel for your needs.  The bladder is great for alimentary purposes and is fixed at both ends to prevent contact with the inner tank surface. ULTRA-PRO pressure tanks offer fantastic service as the bladder can be replaced with little trouble. The MIG welded carbon steel body has no internal rough spots or sharp edges.When the pump starts, water can enter the membrane tank as system pressure passes the pressure pre-charge with the whole capacity of the tank. Only usable water gets stored. The pressure in the chamber will reach the maximum system pressure and stop the pump, while the tank is filled to maximum capacity. Pressure in the airside will push water into the system when water is required. ULTRA-PRO tanks do not water log and deliver all possible water.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane100% factory tested procedures and certified to PED 97/23/EC24 - 3000 litre capacityReplaceable bladderFor use with potable waterPainted externally with long-lasting epoxy powderMild steel or stainless steel flanges for aggressive water
product.variant_name: DISCON - Zilmet Floor Standing Horizontal Vessels With Interchangeable Membrane - 24l

product.description:
This Zimlet vertical vessel has an interchangeable membrane. The CAL-PRO expansion vessels allow absorption of water volume variations in closed heating systems. They maintain constant pressure, in turn minimising energy consumption. With different options available, these vessels meet various system needs.

product.name: Zilmet Stainless Steel Dull Finish Vessel
product.description: This stainless steel dull finish vessel is an excellent choice for applications that have high hygienic standards and require an almost limitless product life. The vessel is compact to allow for simple installation in plants that produce sanitary hot water using water heaters or heat exchangers. The combined use of stainless steel and specific membrane material is suitable for use in food processing and temperatures up to 70°C.Features & Benefits: Zilmet Stainless Steel Dull Finish Vessel Stainless steel with a dull finishEquipped with a non-toxic membrane suitable for drinking water (British WRAS/WRc and French ACS regulations)1/2" thread connection0.16-1 litre capacity

product.name: Pipelife Pushfit Spigot Elbow
product.description: This spigot elbow from Pipelife is easy to use and install. Careful fitting allows leaks to be avoided and, when kept clear of dirt and debris, the 'rubber ring seal' can form a watertight seal. When de-mounting, the pipe should be cut back to behind the location of the fitting to compensate for potential pipe scoring.Features & Benefits: Pipelife Pushfit Spigot ElbowEasy to use and installCareful fitting allows leaks to be avoidedWhen kept clear of dirt and debris, the 'rubber ring seal' forms a watertight sealSize options available

product.name: TracPipe CSST Gas Coils
product.description: These TracPipe OmegaFlex Semi-Rigid Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) Gas Pipe Coils are a popular and flexible alternative to traditional fixed copper piping, providing a high degree of versatility and usability without sacrificing quality. These pipes utilise a clever corrugated steel design that bends and flexes easily without deforming, sheathed with several other materials to produce a flexible, reliable, and versatile conduit for natural gas systems.TracPipe sections typically install up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, a compelling argument for installers, and all without the need for soldering, welding, or specialist tools; simply bend the sections by hand. Suitable for external and internal use, these CSST sections can be used underground and overground without the need for additional mechanical or corrosion protection, making for a rugged and reliable system.Features & Benefits: TracPipe CSST Gas CoilsFast and fuss-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredRugged, reliable performance both internally and externallyBSI Kitemarked and class-leading B-S1 Euroclass fire ratingsAvailable in pre-packed kits and bulk coilsIn terms of safety and quality, TracPipe continues to tick boxes, holding BSI Kitemarks as well as class-leading B-S1 EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire ratings. Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, it's clear to see why the TracPipe system is such a firm favourite amongst installers.

It can be used for external and internal applications and contains different lengths of pipe and sealing tape, suitable for use with AutoFlare fittings for comprehensive installations.Without soldering, welding or specialist tools needed, Tracpipe sections can be installed up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, making installation easy with the hand-bending of sections.Features & Benefits: TracPipe Omegaflex CSST Installers Kit & TapeFast and fuss-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredReliable performance both internally and externallyAvailable in different sizes with a range of fittings availableBetter gas flow rates than other products so smaller diameter pipes can be used to save money and keep qualityNot annealed (softened) to maintain strength and resistance to damageTracpipe continues to excel in safety and quality, holding BSI kitemarks and compatibility for use in fire-protected areas. It has an up-to-date and comprehensive Design and Installation Specification, meeting the requirements of domestic and commercial/industrial installation standards for Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG). Available in a range of lengths and standard diameter nominals, the Tracpipe system remains a favourite amongst installers.Kit ContentsCut length Tracpipe2m sealing tapeStandards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked to BS 7838 and BS EN 15266Outer cover of TracPipe includes EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire rating of B-s1 d0Please note: Lengths are supplied and cut to size. Due to this, returns on lengths are not accepted.No fittings included.

product.description: This TracPipe OmegaFlex Complete Containment Pipe equipped with an Integrated Containment Sleeve removes the hassle and expense of adding a secondary sleeve. With distinctive ridges lining the internal surface of the outer cover, it boasts enhanced structural integrity and performance.Streamlining the installation process, a convenient pull string is cleverly located between the first and second cover, facilitating easy removal of the outer layer without compromising the inner one. product.name: TracPipe Omegaflex Yellow Silicone Tape
product.description: After you have pressure tested your stainless steel gas pipes, you can use this TracPipe OmegaFlex Yellow Silicone Tape to wrap around the part of the pipe behind the fitting nut that is visible and may be exposed to harsh elements.By using this tape, you can prevent any rusting and corrosion that could potentially cause damage to your pipework, which can save you both time and money when replacing damaged pipes isn't necessary.Features & Benefits: TracPipe Omegaflex Yellow Silicone TapeSuitable to be used outdoorsEnsures pipe protectionAvailable in different lengths and widths for versatile useFor use with stainless steel gas pipesPrevents rusting and corrosionPlease note: No section of TracPipe® flexible coil or TracPipe® semi-rigid gas pipe cut lengths should be visible.

product.name: Loctite Thread Seal 55
product.description: The Loctite 55 Pipe Sealing Cord is a non-curing, high-performance thread sealant designed for quick and reliable sealing of threaded pipe joints in both metal and plastic piping systems. It provides an immediate, full-pressure seal without the need for curing time, making it ideal for applications requiring rapid pressurization.Perfect for sealing threaded joints in plumbing, heating, and gas systems. Ideal for installations requiring immediate pressurization without waiting for sealant curing. Suitable for both residential and industrial piping systems. Supplied in a convenient dispensing container with an integrated cutting tool for precise application.Features & Benefits: Loctite Thread Seal 55Suitable for use on both metal and plastic threaded pipes and fittingsApproved for use with potable water systems (NSF/ANSI Standard 61)Effective in temperatures ranging from -55°C to +149°C
product.variant_name: Loctite Thread Seal 55 - 150m

product.name: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit With Fittings & Tape
product.description: Offering a dynamic and adaptable alternative to conventional fixed copper piping, this TracPipe Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) Installers Kit has garnered significant popularity. This comprehensive kit caters to both interior and exterior applications, facilitating hassle-free male-to-male connection through its inclusive array of AutoFlare fittings and purpose-built sealing tape.Featuring an innovatively designed corrugated steel structure, the pipes effortlessly bend and flex without compromising their integrity. Enhanced with composite sheathing, they provide a dependable conduit for natural gas systems, ensuring remarkable flexibility and reliability. Notably, the TracPipe system boasts an installation speed of up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, presenting a compelling advantage for installers. The absence of soldering, welding or specialised tools streamlines the installation process, allowing for effortless manual manipulation of the sections.Features & Benefits: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit With Fittings & TapeIncludes TracPipe, two male AutoFlare adaptors and sealing tapeQuick and hassle-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredRobust, reliable performance both internally and externallyAvailable in sizes DN12 to DN32 with a comprehensive range of fittingsSuperior gas flow rates, so smaller diameter pipes can be used - saves money without losing qualityDoes not require any hot works or special tools to attach the AutoFlare® fittingsNot annealed (softened) - stronger and more resistant to damageFor Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) distribution2-hour (120 minutes) fire rating when installed in continuous lengths (no joints)With a strong emphasis on safety and quality, TracPipe proudly holds BSI Kitemarks and boasts leading B-S1 EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire ratings. Its availability in various lengths, standard diameter nominals and convenient pre-packed kits reflects its wide-ranging appeal and solidifies its status as a favoured choice. With the most up-to-date and comprehensive Design and Installation Specification, it fully reflects the requirements of both domestic and commercial/industrial installation standards for Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG).Standards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked and class-leading B-S1 Euroclass fire ratingsBSI Kitemarked to both BS 7838 and BS EN 15266
product.variant_name: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit  - 5m DN15, 2 Male 15mm x 1/2 inch Adaptors and small tape

This comprehensive kit caters to both interior and exterior applications, facilitating hassle-free male-to-male connection through its inclusive array of AutoFlare fittings and purpose-built sealing tape.Featuring an innovatively designed corrugated steel structure, the pipes effortlessly bend and flex without compromising their integrity. Enhanced with composite sheathing, they provide a dependable conduit for natural gas systems, ensuring remarkable flexibility and reliability. Notably, the TracPipe system boasts an installation speed of up to three times faster than traditional steel or copper piping, presenting a compelling advantage for installers. The absence of soldering, welding or specialised tools streamlines the installation process, allowing for effortless manual manipulation of the sections.Features & Benefits: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit With Fittings & TapeIncludes TracPipe, two male AutoFlare adaptors and sealing tapeQuick and hassle-free installation, up to three times faster than traditional pipingNo soldering, welding, or specialist tools requiredRobust, reliable performance both internally and externallyAvailable in sizes DN12 to DN32 with a comprehensive range of fittingsSuperior gas flow rates, so smaller diameter pipes can be used - saves money without losing qualityDoes not require any hot works or special tools to attach the AutoFlare® fittingsNot annealed (softened) - stronger and more resistant to damageFor Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) distribution2-hour (120 minutes) fire rating when installed in continuous lengths (no joints)With a strong emphasis on safety and quality, TracPipe proudly holds BSI Kitemarks and boasts leading B-S1 EUROCLASS Reaction to Fire ratings. Its availability in various lengths, standard diameter nominals and convenient pre-packed kits reflects its wide-ranging appeal and solidifies its status as a favoured choice. With the most up-to-date and comprehensive Design and Installation Specification, it fully reflects the requirements of both domestic and commercial/industrial installation standards for Natural Gas and Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG).Standards & CertificationBSI Kitemarked and class-leading B-S1 Euroclass fire ratingsBSI Kitemarked to both BS 7838 and BS EN 15266
product.variant_name: Tracpipe CSST Installers Kit  - 5m of DN32,  2 Male 32mm x 1 1/4 inch Adaptors & Small tape

product.name: Inta Male ActivFlo Pro  Power Regulator
product.description: This male ActivFlo Pro power regular provides whole house protection without catalytic turbulence, magnets and semi-precious metals anode and does not require an electrical connection. With a range of sizes available to suit the flow rates of all homes, this ActivFlo is not a filter however it allows the water to pass through and retain all its minerals, making it just as good to drink.
